title: Move LoRa L2 board/devicetree selection behind HAL boundary
description: Why this exists: project-LICHEN-h7t5.1 requires application/protocol code to avoid board-specific capability detection, but the current static scan still finds LoRa L2 using DT_ALIAS(lora0) directly and a CONFIG_BOARD_NATIVE_SIM branch outside the HAL. What needs to be done: evaluate whether LoRa L2 should use lichen_hal_lora_device_get(), a HAL-owned compile-time registration macro, or a documented lower-layer exception; replace or explicitly justify the direct DT_ALIAS/CONFIG_BOARD usage; validate native_sim/qemu LoRa L2 paths without physical radios.
notes:
Implemented no-hardware LoRa L2 HAL boundary: replaced lora_l2.c direct DT_ALIAS(lora0)/LORA_DEV device selection with lichen_hal_lora_device_get(); moved simulation synthetic device identity policy behind HAL helpers; added LICHEN_HAL_HAS_LORA_DEVICE HAL compile-time predicate for L2 build assertions; made CONFIG_LICHEN_LORA_L2 depend on CONFIG_LICHEN_HAL and CONFIG_LICHEN_HAS_LORA; updated lichen_l2.c comments/assertion to HAL-owned chosen zephyr,lora; updated ping_l2 to use lichen_hal_lora_device_get() and enable CONFIG_LICHEN_HAS_LORA; updated lora_ping sample to use chosen zephyr,lora; updated firmware HAL contract static-scan text to include L2 rather than excluding it.

Validation evidence: local git diff --check passed. Static scan passed with no app/protocol non-HAL board/devicetree matches: rg -n '#if.*CONFIG_BOARD|CONFIG_BOARD|DT_ALIAS|DT_CHOSEN' lichen/apps lichen/subsys/lichen | rg -v 'subsys/lichen/hal|CONFIG_BOARD_NAME' returned no matches. Focused scan found only the expected test overlay alias definition in lichen/tests/ping_l2/boards/native_sim.overlay, not C consumer logic. EC2 us-east-2a builder i-0875d1ad33af5db66 with EBS vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58 ran final command: west twister -T lichen/tests/ping_l2 -T lichen/tests/hal -T lichen/apps/gateway -p native_sim -p qemu_x86 --inline-logs --outdir twister-out-h7t5-1-2-final2 --extra-args=ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=$PWD/lichen. Result: 11 scenarios / 22 instances selected, 17/22 configurations passed, 5 static skips, 0 failed, 0 errored, 0 warnings, 327 test cases executed, 115 skipped, 15 executed configs, 2 build-only configs, duration 309.60s. Sample smoke: west build -p always -b native_sim lichen/samples/lora_ping -d build-h7t5-1-2-lora-ping-final -- -DZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=$PWD/lichen -DDTC_OVERLAY_FILE=$PWD/lichen/tests/ping_l2/boards/native_sim.overlay -DEXTRA_CONF_FILE=/tmp/lora_ping_loopback.conf passed; only notable warning was Zephyr loramac-node no SOURCES, pre-existing module warning.

Review evidence: explorers mapped LoRa L2 direct alias/config usage, HAL contract fit, and no-hardware validation targets. First review round: one reviewer clean; P2 finding that LICHEN_LORA_L2 could build without LICHEN_HAS_LORA fixed by adding Kconfig dependency; P2 stale docs/comments and missing Beads evidence fixed by updating docs/firmware-hal-contract.md, lichen_l2.c comments, and this note. Unrelated untracked lichen/boards/renode/nucleo_wl55jc/_integration_test.resc remains intentionally unstaged and excluded from patch/commit.
Final post-fix review evidence: three independent final reviews ran after the LICHEN_HAS_LORA dependency, HAL-owned LORA device predicate, stale docs/comments, and Beads evidence fixes. Agents 019f25eb-1258-7091-9b14-6513fb08b566 and 019f25eb-280a-7b33-977d-8444e0e0a9c6 reported no P0/P1/P2 findings. Agent 019f25eb-3ee5-7621-9590-8efa85ad19aa reported one procedural P2 that final post-fix review outcomes were not recorded in Beads; this note resolves that closure evidence gap. Staged diff check remained clean, and unrelated lichen/boards/renode/nucleo_wl55jc/_integration_test.resc remained unstaged.
close_reason: Completed LoRa L2 HAL boundary and no-hardware validation.
